title: Nigeria’s First Lady Hosts Charity Gala to Empower Underserved Children Through Creative Education - FinancialEDGE
description: The SHOM Charity Gala 2025, hosted by the Nigerian First Lady, HE Senator Oluremi Tinubu, and the Spouses of Heads of Mission (SHOM) Abuja, was held on Wednesday, 21 May, at the Banquet Hall of the Presidential Villa, in support of the Five Cowries Arts Education Initiative, a non-profit that leverages arts, storytelling, and community
html: The SHOM Charity Gala 2025, hosted by the Nigerian First Lady, HE Senator Oluremi Tinubu,  and the Spouses of Heads of Mission (SHOM) Abuja, was held on Wednesday, 21 May, at the Banquet Hall of the Presidential Villa, in support of the Five Cowries Arts Education Initiative, a non-profit that leverages arts, storytelling, and community engagement to improve learning outcomes for children in underserved communities in Nigeria.
